# Linkeiro — SaaS Platform QA

## Overview

Linkeiro is a SaaS platform designed to operate as a **link aggregation hub**, allowing users to centralize multiple links into a single shareable page.

My work focused on validating platform stability and core user flows.

## My Role

Main activities:

- Test case creation
- Manual testing
- Exploratory testing
- Platform functionality validation

## Quality Approach

Testing focused on validating:

- Core user flows
- Link management functionality
- Platform reliability under different usage scenarios

## Technologies

- Manual testing
- Exploratory testing
- Test scenario documentation

## Key Contributions

- Identified critical usability issues
- Improved platform reliability
- Validated core features before deployment
